title: Kahaani
tmdbOverview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.
synopsis: Kahaani is a 2012 mystery and thriller film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
